title: Verify version-matched integration guidance
preconditions: A fresh Ledger, a schema-driven External Orchestrator client, optional agent guidance, and compatible and incompatible contract versions.
steps: Exercise every acceptance criterion of FR-LEDGER-SKILL-COMPATIBILITY through public schemas and commands with and without optional agent guidance.
expected: Every workflow is provider-neutral and usable without a required skill; optional guidance uses only public contracts; incompatible versions fail before mutation; all FR-LEDGER-SKILL-COMPATIBILITY criteria hold.
